title: Brianna Lane
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Brianna Lane
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
education_entries: Ph D in Communication, University of Oklahoma
MA in Speech Communication, University of Nevada
BA in Speech Communication and Spanish, University of Nevada
research_interests: interpersonal relationships, computer-mediated communication, online dating, the effects of technology on relationships
teaching_interests: Interpersonal Communication, Quantitative Research Methods, Dark side of Relationships, Nonverbal Communication
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2020). "We Post Pictures to Prove We Are Best Friends:" iGen Friendship Characteristics and Maintenance Strategies . Iowa Journal of Communication. Volume, 52. Issue, 2. Pages, 87-106.
Book, Textbook-Revised (2019). Interpersonal Communication: An Overview of Basic Principles and Contexts (Second Edition) . Kendall-Hunt Publishing Company. Pages, 371.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2018). Still Too Much of a Good Thing? The replication of Tong, Van Der Heide, Langwell, and Walther (2008) . Communication Studies. Volume, 69. Issue, 3. Pages, 294-303.
